arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the firewall.

delete_protection.description: Indicates if the firewall is protected from being deleted.

encryption_configuration.description: The encryption configuration settings for the firewall.

firewall_policy_arn.description: The ARN of the firewall policy associated with the firewall.

firewall_policy_change_protection.description: Indicates if the firewall policy is protected from changes.

firewall_status.description: The current status and capacity usage summary of the firewall.

id.description: The unique identifier of the firewall.

subnet_change_protection.description: Indicates if the firewall's subnet associations are protected from changes.

subnet_mapping.description: The mapping of subnets associated with the firewall.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the firewall.

update_token.description: A token used for optimistic locking of firewall updates.

vpc_id.description: The ID of the VPC where the firewall is located.
